hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Trung tâm thành phố Tam Kỳ (Tru by Hilton Tam Ky City Centre)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Phòng gọn/ sạch. Nhà vệ sinh có mùi gián.

Khu vực ăn sáng hơi mùi và đĩa không được sạch lắm

reviews.title: That's not the Hilton.
reviews.text: I regret this guy's bravado, believing only in the brand.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
חדר חדש נעים ונקי מאוד, מיטה נוחה ביותר
ארוחת בוקר מצוינת

reviews.title: A pleasant stay with room for improvement
reviews.text:
I chose to stay at this hotel because of my trust in the Hilton brand. My first impression of the reception area was that the space felt smaller than expected, though the staff were professional and warmly welcoming.

The room was clean, the bed was very comfortable, and the bathroom was well maintained. However, my room category did not include a hair dryer and did not have a Smart TV, which are amenities I would typically expect from a property of this standard.

Breakfast was served à la carte. The fried rice I selected was flavorful, while my companion had the chicken pho and felt that the dish did not meet expectations.

Overall, it was a pleasant stay. I would consider returning in the future, especially if the amenities are further improved.

reviews.title: Đáng giá
reviews.positives: Phòng nhỏ nhưng rất xinh và hiện đại

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A simple breakfast, without any other options. Newly built.
reviews.response:
Xin chào anh/chị Phước,

Cảm ơn anh/chị đã đánh giá tích cực và góp ý chân thành. 
Chúng tôi ghi nhận ý kiến về bữa sáng và sẽ cải thiện phần thực đơn thêm phong phú . 
Rất mong sớm được đón tiếp anh/chị lần nữa với những trải nghiệm mới và dịch vụ tốt hơn.

Bao.Nguyen
Hotel Operation Manager

reviews.title: Recommended for family with children, for adult prefer sport, for everybody. 👍
reviews.negatives: Perfect gym. But why 2x same machine? But one of the best gym in my holydays in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Best Hotel in Tam Ky
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay at Tru by Hilton in Tam Ky.  The room was well designed with all the things I needed- a comfortable bed with fresh sheets, plush pillows, a working station, clean washroom...The room had a huge window with a lovely view of the city and the mountains; it felt peaceful going to bed and waking up.  I made use of the gym with all the equipment I needed for a good workout. The staff was kind and helpful.  The hotel was close to the city square and many good coffee shops and eateries. This hotel will be my place of choice when I visit Tam Ky.

reviews.title: VALUE FOR MONEY - NICE NEW HOTEL
reviews.positives:
It's a nice NEW and quiet hotel - with the best location in town - and with a beautiful view from all sides (all rooms) 
The staff are so polite and service-oriented 24-7 🙏
reviews.negatives: They still need some training for making a good  cappuccino, but it's a small detail (they actually have the right equipment at the bar/cafe) nevermind😊👍

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, conveniently located for transportation and parking. The room is clean, beautiful, and has a great city view. My family had a good experience at Tru By Hilton.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room is clean, comfortable, and the staff are enthusiastic in guiding and assisting. The facilities are very good. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Highly recommend
reviews.room_type: King Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Prima 3 sterren hotel
reviews.text:
Kamers zien er als nieuw uit.  Handdoeken zijn perfect, spierwit en lekker zacht en genoeg qua aantal in onze kamer. Wij hadden een dubbele kamer met slaapbank, hierdoor hadden we 2 badkamers tot onze beschikking en 2 wastafels.  Perfect! 

Ontbijt is basic. 
We hebben brommers gehuurd via de receptie. Zeer vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel. 
De was- en droogruimte kwam perfect uit voor ons, we hebben een wasje gedraaid. 

Er ligt stof op de stopcontacten en er zijn allemaal vingervlekken in de liften.
reviews.room_type: King Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Nice and comfortable
reviews.text:
Location is nice, rooms are clean and comfortable.
Only thing what i missed was more options on restaurants menu.
